series_metadata.series_description: Geotechnical investigation reports and recommendations, pile driving logs, drilled shafts construction records, dynamic driven piles testing reports and data, lateral load test data, ostergerg load test data, static load test data and other project specific geotechnical data.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
